mentions.note: Down over 31% in 2025 as core payments commoditize and it lags in buy-now-pay-later and stablecoins, but now trades at just 10x earnings — maybe 2026 is when it gets too cheap to ignore.
Not doing well; avoid recommending on basis of takeover speculation, which rarely works out.
Enrique Lores (ex-HPE CEO) now leading; company too hard to fix despite leadership change. Capital One Financial preferred alternative.
